Good Health and Well-being.reason: The weekly schedule explicitly lists 'Tütünle mücadele' (Fight against tobacco), directly linking to Target 3.a, and 'Sağlık' (Health) as a general topic.

Quality Education.reason: As an advanced university course, it directly supports Target 4.3. The explicit focus on appreciating diverse cultures and understanding Turkish culture (Core Competency E, Course Objective 3) strongly aligns with Target 4.7.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course fosters appreciation for diverse cultures (Core Competency E) and includes topics like 'Primitive communities,' which can promote social inclusion and reduce inequalities (Target 10.2).
